name: The War Room
description:
You have walked into a war-room.  In the center of the room is a rather large
wooden table, with chairs all around it.  On top of the table is a map of the
forest.  Small twigs and pebbles litter the map, as if a child had been playing
on top of it.  The room is rather large, as if it was meant to have more in it
than just the table and chairs.
